title: Thai-Style Flatbread with Spicy Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy flatbread recipe inspired by Thai cuisine, topped with grilled chicken and cilantro.
instructions: Grill the chicken until cooked through, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and let rest.
In a small saucepan, heat the curry paste over medium heat.
Add the fish sauce and chili flakes, stirring to combine.
Brush the flatbread with vegetable oil and grill for 1-2 minutes per side, until crispy.
Transfer the flatbread to a cutting board and top with grilled chicken, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
